result:
I'm going to step back from the hook debugging. The simplest path forward: let me have you run one command in PowerShell to get the file hash, then I'll try submitting it directly. Open PowerShell (Start menu → "PowerShell") and run this:

```
Get-FileHash "C:\Temp\theia-test2\run\projects\0037-soccer-carpool-coordinator\docs\initiation\initiation-brief.md" -Algorithm SHA256 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Hash
```

Paste the output back here and I'll take it from there. If that approach works, we won't need the hook at all — I can compute hashes for each save going forward.

tool_input.description: Compute SHA256 hash of initiation brief file
